category_sources: source_facts.description describes vmnet.framework support for rootless QEMU; official README at https://github.com/lima-vm/socket_vmnet describes vmnet.framework support for QEMU.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is socket_vmnet; official repository https://github.com/lima-vm/socket_vmnet uses the same name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for socket_vmnet installation, usage, and FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/lima-vm/socket_vmnet, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions vmnet.framework and rootless QEMU; official README documents QEMU, Lima, bridged mode, and macOS vmnet usage.
